message:
refactor(test): clippy fixes in dispatch latency and conformance scenarios

event_dispatch_latency.rs:
- Fix redundant string formatting in synth_noop_extension template
- Simplify event handler iteration pattern
- Remove unnecessary variable shadowing

ext_conformance_scenarios.rs:
- Clean up mock interceptor match arms for idiomatic pattern matching
- Simplify check_expectations_inner assertion logic
- Remove redundant clone() calls on Arc references

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
